form.formComment: Second-up. First start 5th of 11 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on May 30 over 1300m, 4 len behind Glamour Ana carrying 58kg at $10. Returned from break came from midfield; 3rd of 10 at this track Mdn on April 3 over 1300m, 2.25 len behind Maximus Bon carrying 56kg at $3.70. Great fresh effort and he can get the job done this time with the blinkers going on.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1100m, shifted in before being straightened.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 5th of 10 at this track Mdn on April 3 over 1300m, 3.5 len behind Maximus Bon carrying 56kg at $31. Previously second-up second last of 15 at Ascot Mdn on December 10 over 1800m, 19 len behind Final Call carrying 58kg at $201. Won't be far away.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 4th of 10 at this track Mdn on April 3 over 1300m, 2.75 len behind Maximus Bon with 57.5kg at $3.10. Previously second-up 6th of 16 at Ascot Mdn on October 15 over 1500m, 4 len behind Buthelezi with 56kg at $8. Fitter for that run and is expected to be in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 5th of 12 at Pinjarra 3yo Mdn on November 30 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Hurricane Harley with 57kg at $8.50. Nice trial coming in and he won't be far away on his return.

form.formComment: At the latest run 7th of 10 at this track Mdn on April 3 over 1300m, 6 len behind Maximus Bon with 56kg at $101. The run before that 11th of 15 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on February 22 over 1800m, 9 len behind Heavenly Rapture carrying 56kg at $31. Hard to enthuse.

The run before that 11th of 15 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on February 22 over 1800m, 9 len behind Heavenly Rapture carrying 56kg at $31. Hard to enthuse.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Taken back from its wide barrier shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months got back early 6th of 10 at this track Mdn on April 3 over 1300m, 4 len behind Maximus Bon with 52.5kg at $10. Previously second-up 10th of 13 at Bunbury Mdn on December 7 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Offshore with 54.5kg at $41. Outside chance with the run under her belt.
